mapper.select: SELECT id, name, room_number, auth_users, level, dept_id, dept_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted FROM t_prison

select p.id, p.name, (select count(*) from t_building b where b.prison_id = p.id and b.is_deleted=0) as buildingNum, (select count(*) from t_device de where de.prison_id = p.id and de.is_deleted=0) as totalDevices, (select count(*) from t_device de where de.prison_id = p.id and de.is_deleted=0 and de.power_off=0) as onlineDevices, (select count(*) from t_device de where de.prison_id = p.id and de.is_deleted=0 and de.power_off=1) as offlineDevices, (select count(*) from t_alarm a where a.prison_id = p.id and a.is_deleted=0) as totalAlarms from t_prison p where p.id = #{prisonId}

select b.id,b.name,b.floor_num as floorNum, b.ground_floor_num as groundFloorNum, b.underground_floor_num as undergroundFloorNum, (select count(*) from t_device d where d.building_id = b.id and d.is_deleted = 0) as totalDevices from t_building b where b.is_deleted= 0 and b.prison_id = #{prisonId}

SELECT id, name,dept_id, level FROM t_prison
is_deleted = 0
and dept_id in
#{id}
and id = -1
AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.name},'%') )
